title: salix × podperae
intro: Salix × podperae, also known as Podpera's willow, is a hybrid plant derived from the crossing of Salix × sepulcralis and Salix alba. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high salicylic acid content, which is similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × podperae include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it effective in treating conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Salix × podperae can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
